headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Williams-Sonoma, Raises Price Target to $230
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Oliver Wintermantel   maintains Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $210 to $230.
